reviews.review_msg: The amount of work required is fair. Lots of readings but fulfilling through the end. Put some effort and you will be doing well. Lectures were pretty enjoyable and so were tutorials. Workload isn't as heavy so you could take this a as part or full time student

Sandie is such an amazing and unique prof. Warm, friendly energy in class. Very human and down to earth, super flexible with assignment deadlines. "Lectures" didn't include a lot of lecturing which was nice. Coursework was really easy and chill, but not uninformative. Definitely recommend her!
The TAs are really tough graders for no curve class
Lectures were content heavy, and pretty boring. More interesting content could've been chosen for class material and final project. Project not really connected to lectures.

Takes 8-10 business days to respond to student inquiries. Seemed uninterested in helping students or doing any actual work. I would not recommend this class as a GPA booster especially when the writing is graded as if it's a 400 level class. And that is coming from a 4th year student who has experienced a 400 level writing course.
boring lectures, she is nice HOWEVER! I never knew how my assignments and quizzes are graded based on her standards

Lectures are super boring she could make it interesting but meh. Average grader but if u r good in writing u can score well. Its not a gpa booster course tho, u need to be able to write well while getting rid of ur misogyny LOL or else this class aint for u.
The class was fun, however the course is harder than it show . you have to be consistent and prepare well.
very nice !!

Very kind lecturer. The topic wasn't one I was particularly interested in, nor would I have taken if not mandatory for business students, but her lectures were engaging and she's very passionate and knowledgeable. One complaint I have was the lack of timely feedback, but that was more to do with her TA's and she was reachable to rectify the issue.
She is the best
very tough grader. Nice and kind. Gives extensions when needed.

50% of course was 2 online open book midterms
TAs marked the discussion posts harshly and inconsistently

Review of the online section of the class. Not sure how she teaches the in person section. Course is not even taught by her, it is prerecorded lectures from another prof (Joyce). Like below review stated, 50% of grade in 5 quizzes. Each quiz requires crazy memorization based on around 4-5 readings, videos, lectures. Not a GPA booster as many claim.

This class is ridiculous, more about memorization than content. 50% of your grade is MC quizzes. Professor is unfamiliar with content as it is an old class from another professor. Unresponsive to messages and does not appreciate questions. TAs were great. Has potential to be a great class with a little effort from prof. Do not recommend.

This prof appears to be nice and friendly but her course does not at all reflect that. The discussion post criteria is not clear and hard to do well on. The grading is reliant on you having revelations about boring course content. The organization and assignment instructions are overcomplicated and confusing. Not a GPA booster, hard to do well.
Sandie is great and knowledgeable and nice but her TAs are bad
Amazing prof!

She gave us 20% of participation mark, so join a class is such a important thing.
There are 2 exams(write around 100 words of 5 terms from slides). Both are kinda hard but if you review the slides and listen to lectures, you'll be fine :) and even if you had a bad score, she'll give you a chance to get extra marks, so talk to her! Overall, so nice!

She's kind, caring, and wants the best for all of her students. She has great lectures and is even flexible with deadlines. She is accessible outside of class and really tries to help her students. Sometimes, the grading can be vague but overall your writing will definitely improve!

Sandie teaches important topics and is very kind and caring. There are only a couple of projects that will make up your grade. No exams but lengthy papers. Not a lot of feedback so it's hard to improve/know what you lost points on.
truly an amazing and kind prof that wants the best for her students
Sandie is such a lovely teacher and I learned so much in INDG301. There are big projects, but Sandie was supportive throughout the whole process and the projects were super rewarding.

I love Sandie and I will miss her when we end the course. She very nice and you can share everything with her. She always laughs :)) and teaches very easily to understand. Just show up every class and focus on her lecture slide, you will pass

Sandie is an amazing prof who genuinely cares about her students. Very flexible with deadlines and is understanding of the pressure students are under during this pandemic. She gives very clear feedback on writing assignments and is extremely helpful when asking for clarification.

A literal angel!! Sandie is so accommodating and sweet. Not to mention her lectures are really interesting and you end up learning a lot by the end of the semester! Thank you sandie for being so amazing <3

Sandie is so kind and passionate about teaching. She was very flexible with deadlines and was available for extra help which was amazing since this was most peoples first semester all online due to Covid.
Easy course with a great prof, why not??
I love her so much!!! She cares about her student and gives high marks for students.

Sandie is an easygoing and super friendly prof. She is very lenient but gets stuck on certain small criteria when grading so make sure you follow the specific instructions and read the fine print. Extensions are almost always given out and the assignments themselves are all very easy. She asigns a lot of reading but never checks up on it. GPA boost

Sandie is a real gem of all the courses present there. She is a pretty kind-hearted and generous soul ie. looks and takes care of her students pretty well. In general, FNST201 is more of a writing course and a very easy course too. Sandie makes it very easy for her students to get an A or A+. If you follow the guidelines given by her. DO YOUR BEST
she is my favorite professor. she is caring, helpful professor among all other. i love this course and her as well. she has made the 200 level course easy and interesting to study.
She is the kindest prof ever, Please be nice to her. IF you have any problems just let her know about it she will help you. Very encouraging.

She is just amazing. Always ready to talk to you and discuss your papers. If you need some more time for your assignment(s) just talk to her, and she will let you submit later. She is clear with her expectations, so you can easily get an A or even A+ if you follow the instructions.

I took her class at FIC. She helped me so much to do well in this course. I got 100% almost in all assignments. Just listen carefully to what she needs from you and follow the instructions, and you'll get 100%. Her lectures kind of useless, but you still have to attend because participation and attendance worth 20%. Good luck!

Sandie is incredibly engaging and passionate on the subject that she teaches. This course is a W, so there is a lot of writing. She's a fair marker. She cares about students and making sure that classroom is a safe space. With her as a prof, one feels safe to ask questions and explore new ideas. I  would love to have her as a prof again.
